summary: Warehouse Management and Raw Materials modules fully tested. All 27 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Production Queue task toggle with Eye icon, Warehouses page with CRUD and stats, Raw Materials page with stock adjustments, sidebar INVENTORY section with 4 links (Stock Items, Product Variants, Warehouses, Raw Materials).

TestWarehouseAPI.test_warehouse_stats: PASS - Stats returned (total, active, capacity, utilization)

production_queue_page.eye_icon: PASS - Eye/EyeOff icon present in toggle button
production_queue_page.stats_cards: PASS - Total Jobs, Queued, In Progress, Completed, Blocked
production_queue_page.kanban_board: PASS - 7 status columns with production cards

warehouses_page.warehouse_cards: PASS - WH-MAIN, TEST-WH-DEL, TEST-WH-UPD, TEST-WH-ALPHA displayed
warehouses_page.warehouse_form_modal: PASS - Opens with name, code, type, capacity fields
warehouses_page.edit_delete_buttons: PASS - Edit and Delete buttons on cards
warehouses_page.search_input: PASS - Search by name, code, city working

raw_materials_page.materials_table: PASS - Table with SKU, Name, Category, On Hand, Reserved, Available, Unit, Cost, Supplier, Actions
raw_materials_page.material_form_modal: PASS - Opens with name, SKU, category, unit of measure, stock fields

stock_adjustment.adjust_form_modal: PASS - Opens with adjustment type (add/remove/set), quantity, reason
stock_adjustment.adjustment_types: PASS - Add Stock, Remove Stock, Set Stock options

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: DialogContent components show 'Missing Description' console warning - consider adding aria-describedby for accessibility
seed_data_creation: Test warehouses created: TEST-WH-ALPHA, TEST-WH-UPD, TEST-WH-DEL. Test materials created: TEST-RAW-COT-001, TEST-RAW-UPD-001, TEST-RAW-DEL-001, TEST-RAW-ADJ-001. These can be cleaned up via admin UI.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Warehouse and Raw Materials features fully implemented and tested. Key endpoints: /api/admin/warehouses/* for warehouse CRUD with stats/summary. /api/admin/raw-materials/* for materials CRUD with /categories, /low-stock, /{id}/adjust-stock for stock adjustments. Production queue now supports ?assigned_to filter parameter for task visibility toggle. Admin sidebar has INVENTORY section with 4 links: Stock Items, Product Variants, Warehouses, Raw Materials.
